creator: ragge@bakfull.campus.luth.se
text:
When both tape and disk are used at the same time timeouts occur
on the disk (ahc0: target 0, lun 0 (sd0) timed out) and then
the disk never returns to usable state; the computer locks up.

Fix: 

No idea. Don't know so much about SCSI.
How-To-Repeat: 
I always get this when using dump. Not so nice :-(
